phrases.en: I swung my leg over the bike.
I started pedaling and the bike moved.
phrases.zh: 我开始蹬脚踏板，自行车动了起来。

phrases.en: To go uphill, I shifted into a lower gear.
phrases.zh: 为了上坡，我换到了更低的挡。

phrases.en: To slow down, I squeezed the brakes.
phrases.zh: 为了减速，我捏紧了刹车。

phrases.en: Finally, I got off my bike.
I locked it up in a bike rack.
phrases.zh: 我把它锁在了停车架上。
